title: cliffortia dregeana var. dregeana
intro: Cliffortia dregeana var. dregeana, also known as the Droge Cliffortia, is a plant species belonging to the Cliffortia genus in the family Rosaceae. It is a shrubby plant with small white flowers that is native to South Africa. Cliffortia dregeana var. dregeana has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
